# External xdelta fixture matrix

These fixtures use deterministic project-owned synthetic bytes generated by `generate.py`. They
contain no game, literary, or other third-party source content. Default tests read the checked-in
bytes and never execute the generator, access the network, or invoke xdelta.

## Producers

Assets were downloaded and hashed on 2026-07-10.

### xdelta 3.1.0

- Repository: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta-gpl`
- Release: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta-gpl/releases/tag/v3.1.0`
- Tag commit: `4b4aed71a959fe11852e45242bb6524be85d3709`
- Windows asset: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta-gpl/releases/download/v3.1.0/xdelta3-3.1.0-x86_64.exe.zip`
- Windows asset size: 217891
- Windows asset SHA-256: `b10e0d1df3e212e5a2d37d5c088d2f72ecec760bc3c26caeca51499c3118b93a`
- Extracted executable size: 624463
- Extracted executable SHA-256: `6855c01cf4a1662ba421e6f95370cf9afa2b3ab6c148473c63efe60d634dfb9a`
- Release source asset: `xdelta3-3.1.0.tar.gz`
- Release source asset URL: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta-gpl/releases/download/v3.1.0/xdelta3-3.1.0.tar.gz`
- Release source asset size: 727,607
- Release source asset SHA-256: `114543336ab6cee3764e3c03202701ef79d7e5e8e4863fe64811e4d9e61884dc`

The prior value `d4697eab5da9e3f76bf133a2bd46a601e3f1a974f0a7ccbf949d9745ceba909f`
cannot be tied to a named official asset, so its previous source-tarball attribution was unsupported.
The separate current GitHub-generated tag archive was 1,036,994 bytes with SHA-256
`40188ac0ae07d682b102c665a9c4d37cea414393eeeaf9a1d36209e87722d032`; it is not the
release asset. The upstream release includes detached signature assets, but no
signature-authentication claim is made here.

### xdelta 3.2.0

- Repository: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta`
- Release: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta/releases/tag/v3.2.0`
- Tag commit: `ff322e592383227b0d65ddfde7e0e5bbc504dc15`
- Windows asset: `https://github.com/jmacd/xdelta/releases/download/v3.2.0/xdelta3-3.2.0-windows-x86_64.zip`
- Windows asset size: 184374
- Windows asset SHA-256: `af8ef036cb077a48df080c9a8ac1be4a6e7511c32d11f8bec89b6803a9e52576`
- Extracted executable size: 336896
- Extracted executable SHA-256: `53d90226615f217d3380c39892833311b4e24acd863e1ca01f14b5e772e2e6d0`

Producer binaries and archives are not redistributed. Full `-V` and `config` output is under
`producers/`; both configurations report `SECONDARY_LZMA=1`.

## Commands

`XDELTA` was unset for every command.

```text
xdelta3-3.1.0-x86_64.exe -e -A -N -S none -W 16384 -s source.bin target.bin xdelta-3.1.0-none.vcdiff
xdelta3-3.1.0-x86_64.exe -e -A -N -S lzma -W 16384 -s source.bin target.bin xdelta-3.1.0-lzma.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -e -a -A -N -S none -W 16384 -s source.bin target.bin xdelta-3.2.0-none.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -e -a -A -N -S lzma -W 16384 -s source.bin target.bin xdelta-3.2.0-lzma.vcdiff
xdelta3.exe -e -s source.bin target.bin xdelta-3.2.0-default.vcdiff
```

The last command is the literal xdelta 3.2.0 default invocation with no behavior-changing flags.
Its standard `VCD_APPHEADER` retains the default ASCII BLAKE3 armor metadata. Per-fixture
`printhdrs` output is under `printhdrs/`.

Each delta was decoded by its matching external producer to 98304 bytes with target SHA-256
`c21ff467100a57e3495cf97bd025a9c903c32a85fd927f5d13b559d2b197daae`. The checked-in
files are generated VCDIFF outputs; no producer executable or archive is redistributed.
